title_zh: 从显式元素到隐式意图：可审计行为推理的预定义库
title_en: From Explicit Elements to Implicit Intent: A Predefined Library for Auditable Behavioral Inference
summary_zh: SemantiClean 是一个模块化框架，用于从电商会话数据中提取结构化语义信号，并通过共享元素库驱动多种推理目标如购买意图、客户细分和产品关联。不同于仅优化准确性的端到端预测器，SemantiClean 优先考虑可审计性、结构治理和零误差可复现性，换取元素级透明度和可辩护的决策轨迹。框架基于 OSPI 数据集，将24个行为元素组织为四层架构，并通过多种机制确保信号质量。该报告还介绍了集成大语言模型的两阶段推理引擎，实现了推理时完整元素元数据的利用，结果可控且部分具有一定输出变异性。
summary_en: SemantiClean is a modular framework that extracts structured semantic signals from e-commerce session data and drives multiple inference targets including purchase intent, customer segmentation, and product affinity through a shared element library. Unlike traditional end-to-end predictors optimizing solely for accuracy, SemantiClean prioritizes auditability, structural governance, and zero-error reproducibility, trading marginal accuracy gains for element-level transparency and defensible decision trails. Built on the OSPI dataset, it organizes twenty-four behavioral elements into a four-layer architecture and enforces signal quality with multiple anti-inflation mechanisms. The report also introduces an LLM-integrated two-phase inference engine leveraging full element metadata, producing reproducible and controlled results with some output variability.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作创新性地平衡了预测准确性与可审计性，提供了更透明和结构化的行为推理方案，适合对决策解释和治理要求高的场景。采用多层架构和防篡改机制有效保障信号质量，结合大语言模型提升推理能力，推动了电商行为分析的可靠性与透明度。
why_it_matters_en: This work innovatively balances prediction accuracy with auditability, offering a more transparent and structured behavioral inference solution suitable for scenarios requiring explanation and governance of decisions. The multi-layer architecture and anti-inflation mechanisms effectively maintain signal quality, while integration with large language models enhances inference capabilities, advancing reliability and transparency in e-commerce behavioral analysis.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: From Explicit Elements to Implicit Intent: A Predefined Library for Auditable Behavioral Inference. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 观点：海马体显式记忆是通用人工智能的基石
title_en: Position: Hippocampal Explicit Memory Is the Cornerstone for AGI
summary_zh: 该论文指出，大型语言模型（LLM）的学习机制类似于人类的隐式记忆，而实现通用人工智能（AGI）所需的高级认知功能如长期战略规划、元认知和符号推理，则依赖于海马体的显式记忆，单靠隐式统计学习无法实现。作者结合神经科学发现，提出将显式记忆系统整合进LLM，以推动AGI的发展。
summary_en: This position paper argues that large language models (LLMs), whose learning resembles human implicit memory, require integration of hippocampal explicit memory to achieve higher cognitive functions essential for AGI, such as long-term planning, metacognition, and symbolic reasoning. Drawing from neuroscience and computational perspectives, the paper advocates for explicit memory integration to advance AGI research.
why_it_matters_zh: 因为显式记忆支持通用智能所需的高级认知能力，而现有LLM仅模仿隐式记忆，难以完成如战略规划和符号推理等任务，故显式记忆是迈向AGI的关键。
why_it_matters_en: Because explicit memory underpins higher-order cognitive abilities essential for AGI, while current LLMs mimic only implicit memory and fall short on tasks like strategic planning and symbolic reasoning, explicit memory integration is thus crucial for advancing AGI.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Position: Hippocampal Explicit Memory Is the Cornerstone for AGI. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: AI代理能综合科学结论吗？
title_en: Can AI Agents Synthesize Scientific Conclusions?
summary_zh: 本文介绍了SciConBench，一个包含9110个问题和专家撰写结论的大规模实时基准，用于评估开放领域科学结论综合能力。研究发现，在控制环境下，领先AI模型的事实准确率较低，最佳模型的事实F1仅为0.337。通过引入SciConHarness的‘无泄露’评估框架，证明过去的性能评估存在数据泄露问题，夸大了模型的实际能力。对消费者端AI代理的审计显示，即使有准确答案，它们产生的结论仍不完整甚至自相矛盾，显示可靠综合科学结论依然是重要挑战。
summary_en: The paper presents SciConBench, a large-scale live benchmark of 9,110 questions with expert-written conclusions to evaluate open-domain scientific conclusion synthesis. Evaluations under controlled 'clean-room' conditions reveal low factual quality, with the best AI agent achieving only a 0.337 factual F1 score. The introduction of SciConHarness prevents data leakage, showing prior evaluations overestimated model capabilities. Audits of consumer-facing AI agents reveal they often generate incomplete or contradictory conclusions despite the availability of ground-truth answers, underscoring that reliable scientific conclusion synthesis remains a significant challenge.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过严格的无泄露评估框架，系统评测了多款前沿AI模型和消费端代理在科学结论综合上的表现，揭示了当前技术的不足和过往评估的偏差。其结果强调了科学领域AI结论综合的复杂度和必要的评估标准，对推动AI在高风险领域的可靠应用具有重要指导意义。
why_it_matters_en: This study systematically evaluates leading AI models and consumer agents under stringent leak-free conditions, exposing current limitations and evaluation biases in scientific conclusion synthesis. The findings highlight the complexity of AI synthesis in scientific domains and the importance of rigorous evaluation standards, providing critical insights for advancing reliable AI applications in high-stakes areas.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Can AI Agents Synthesize Scientific Conclusions?. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 利用多模态语言模型检测社交媒体上的AI生成内容
title_en: Detecting AI-Generated Content on Social Media with Multi-modal Language Models
summary_zh: 生成式AI推动了具有高度逼真性的图像和视频创作，被广泛传播于社交媒体，用于垃圾信息、误导、操控与欺诈。现有AIGC检测方法面临泛化能力差、单一模态依赖及缺乏可解释性等难题。本文提出通过持续收集多模态社交媒体数据，训练紧凑的视觉语言模型，实现检测及解释功能。该模型在公开基准测试中表现卓越，并在多平台内部数据集上展现出强健的检测与解释能力。部署于社交媒体的帖子推荐系统后，显著提升了用户参与度，证明在动态真实环境中有效检测AIGC的可行性。
summary_en: Generative AI has enabled creation of photorealistic images and videos increasingly shared on social media, often for spam, misinformation, manipulation, and fraud. Existing AI-generated content detection methods struggle with poor generalization to new models, reliance on single modalities, and lack of interpretability. This work presents a pipeline that continuously curates diverse multi-modal social media data and trains a compact vision-language model for detection and explanation. The model achieves state-of-the-art performance on public benchmarks and robust detection and explanation on internal multi-platform datasets. Deployed in social media post recommendation, it demonstrated positive impacts on user engagement, confirming the feasibility of effective AIGC detection in dynamic real-world environments.
why_it_matters_zh: 应对多样化且不断演进的AI生成内容，采用多模态数据和紧凑视觉语言模型能够提升检测的泛化能力和可解释性，保障社交媒体内容的真实性与安全。
why_it_matters_en: To address the diversity and evolution of AI-generated content, leveraging multi-modal data and compact vision-language models enhances detection generalization and interpretability, ensuring authenticity and safety of social media content.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Detecting AI-Generated Content on Social Media with Multi-modal Language Models. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 一键越狱，多语种理解：学习语言无关的意图表示以检测多语种越狱攻击
title_en: One Jailbreak, Many Tongues: Learning Language-Insensitive Intention Representations for Multilingual Jailbreak Detection
summary_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）在全球多语种用户中的广泛应用，安全训练主要集中于主流语言，未能同步提升多语种能力，导致越狱攻击的可利用漏洞。当前的越狱防御主要针对主流语言开发和评估，受限于多语种对齐监督稀缺和语言差异引起的表示分散问题。为此，本文提出MLJailDe框架，利用多语种回译数据增强构建涵盖11种语言的数据集，并通过相对距离约束减少跨语种表示分散，使意图相似的越狱提示在多语种中形成一致聚类，同时采用不平衡感知分类目标缓解类别不平衡，提升多语种决策边界的可靠性。实验显示MLJailDe在多语种环境中性能超越最新方法，F1分数达98.5%，对未见语种平均F1为97.1%，展现出强大的效果和跨语种泛化能力。
summary_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used globally with multilingual users, yet safety training focuses mainly on dominant languages, leading to vulnerabilities for jailbreak attacks. Existing defenses are mostly in dominant languages and limited by sparse multilingual supervision and language variation causing representation dispersion. To address this, MLJailDe, a multilingual jailbreak detection framework, is proposed. It uses multilingual back-translation data augmentation to create a semantically consistent dataset across 11 languages, and applies relative-distance constraints to align jailbreak intent representations across languages. An imbalance-aware classification further improves decision boundaries. Experiments show MLJailDe outperforms state-of-the-art baselines with 98.5% F1 score across languages and 97.1% on unseen languages, demonstrating strong multilingual robustness and cross-lingual generalization.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究针对多语种环境下越狱攻击检测的不足，创新性地提出了语言无关的意图表示学习方法，通过多语种数据增强和跨语种表示约束，有效提升检测模型的多语种鲁棒性和泛化能力，具有重要的实用和研究价值。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the challenge of jailbreak detection in multilingual contexts by innovatively learning language-insensitive intention representations. Utilizing multilingual data augmentation and cross-lingual constraints, it significantly enhances robustness and generalization of detection models across languages, marking a valuable contribution to practical safety in LLM deployment.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: One Jailbreak, Many Tongues: Learning Language-Insensitive Intention Representations for Multilingual Jailbreak Detection. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: LatticeBridge：用于忠实结构化序列合成的稀有事件顺序推断
title_en: LatticeBridge: Rare-Event Sequential Inference for Faithful Structured Sequence Synthesis
summary_zh: LatticeBridge提出了一种结合紧凑前缀语言模型、实例编译的表面自动机和扭曲顺序蒙特卡洛解码器的新方法，用于在结构化序列生成中满足多个输入约束。该方法在2,610个验证任务上提升了严格锚点满足率和平均锚点覆盖度，优于传统贪婪、束搜索和多样本基线。评估全面涵盖了锚点覆盖、源覆盖率、干扰诊断、重叠度、运行时间和粒子统计，刻画了忠实度、重叠率和延迟之间的权衡。
summary_en: LatticeBridge introduces a method combining a compact prefix language model, instance-compiled surface automata, and a twisted sequential Monte Carlo decoder for structured sequence generation that satisfies multiple input-derived constraints simultaneously. Evaluated on 2,610 tasks, it improves exact anchor satisfaction and mean anchor coverage compared to greedy, beam-filtered, and best-of-k baselines. The evaluation includes coverage metrics, source intrusion diagnostics, overlap, runtime, and particle statistics to characterize the trade-offs among faithfulness, overlap, and latency.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破传统解码方法对多个锚点条件联合实现的局限，提出稀有事件顺序推断视角，增强了结构化生成任务中输出的忠实性和覆盖度，具有重要应用价值和理论意义。
why_it_matters_en: This work advances beyond standard decoding limitations in jointly realizing multiple anchor constraints by framing the problem as rare-event sequential inference, thereby improving faithfulness and coverage in structured sequence generation tasks, which is significant both practically and theoretically.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: LatticeBridge: Rare-Event Sequential Inference for Faithful Structured Sequence Synthesis. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PyTorch性能分析（第二部分）：从nn.Linear到融合的多层感知机
title_en: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
summary_zh: 本文深入探讨了PyTorch中的性能分析技术，重点从基础的nn.Linear层扩展到融合的多层感知机（MLP）实现，帮助开发者优化深度学习模型的效率。
summary_en: This article delves into performance profiling techniques in PyTorch, focusing on progressing from the basic nn.Linear layer to a fused multilayer perceptron (MLP) implementation, assisting developers in optimizing deep learning model efficiency.
why_it_matters_zh: 理解PyTorch中各组件的性能表现对于模型优化至关重要，融合层技术能够提升计算速度和资源利用率。
why_it_matters_en: Understanding the performance of components in PyTorch is critical for model optimization, and fused layer techniques can enhance computational speed and resource utilization.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

why_it_matters_zh: 该报告指出，相关势力利用AI技术操控舆论，影响关键技术议题，值得关注。
why_it_matters_en: The report highlights how certain actors leverage AI to manipulate discourse on critical tech issues, which is a cause for concern.

title_zh: 代理如何通过链式调用两个Hugging Face Spaces创建3D巴黎画廊
title_en: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种创新方法，利用两个Hugging Face Spaces的链式调用，构建了一个逼真的3D巴黎画廊。此技术展示了多模型协作的潜力，提升了生成模型的实际应用能力。
summary_en: This article presents an innovative approach that chains two Hugging Face Spaces to build a realistic 3D Paris gallery. The technique showcases the potential of multi-model collaboration, enhancing the practical applications of generative models.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过展示如何将多个AI模型组合使用，提升了生成复杂3D场景的效率和效果，推动了AI工具在视觉内容创作中的应用发展。
why_it_matters_en: By demonstrating how to combine multiple AI models, it improves the efficiency and quality of generating complex 3D scenes, advancing the application of AI tools in visual content creation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
